generated_oml:
instance LiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "LiDAR sensor capturing raw point cloud data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDAR_RawPointCloud
]

instance MotorSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring motor RPM and operational status"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorData_Transmitted
]

instance SteeringServoSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor tracking steering servo position and movement"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringData_Transmitted
]

instance VehicleStateSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor collecting vehicle speed, position, and state parameters"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleState_Transmitted
]

instance BrakeActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuator for applying emergency braking commands"
]

instance SteeringActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuator for steering control"
]

instance ThrottleActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuator for throttle control"
]

instance ThreeDVisualization : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Real-time 3D visualization of vehicle state and object tracks"
]

instance ControlPanel : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "UI for operator commands like ACC enable/disable, speed setting"
]

instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "User-facing entity with 3D Visualization and Control Panel subcomponents"
    base:contains ThreeDVisualization, ControlPanel
]

instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Cloud-based data processing and management"
]

instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Physical vehicle components for data collection and actuation"
    base:contains LiDAR, MotorSensor, SteeringServoSensor, VehicleStateSensor, BrakeActuator, SteeringActuator, ThrottleActuator
]

instance SystemEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains UserEntity, DigitalTwinEntity, PhysicalTwinEntity
]

instance LiDAR_RawPointCloud : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LiDAR
]

instance MotorData_Transmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorSensor
]

instance SteeringData_Transmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringServoSensor
]

instance VehicleState_Transmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleStateSensor
]

instance VehicleState_Data : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Serialized vehicle state information after unit conversion and message alignment"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleState_Transmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataMonitoringEnabler, ACCComputationOffloadingEnabler
]

instance ObjectTracksData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Clustered and tracked object data from LiDAR point clouds"
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LiDAR
]

instance ProjectedDrivingPathData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Projected driving path data for ACC system"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ObjectTracksData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataMonitoringEnabler
]

instance DataMonitoringEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Processes sensor data for real-time visualization and reporting"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance ACCComputationOffloadingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Offloads ACC system's lead vehicle detection, speed computation, and actuation commands to cloud infrastructure"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance RemoteManagementEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Handles operator commands for ACC control via UI"
    DTDFVocab:enables RemoteManagementService
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of vehicle state data, projected driving paths, detected object tracks, and reporting capabilities for operators and developers"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeVehicleStateVisualization, ObjectTracksVisualization, ProjectedPathVisualization
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Offloading ACC system's lead vehicle detection, speed computation based on distance, and actuation commands from vehicle ECUs to cloud infrastructure"
    DTDFVocab:provides LeadVehicleDetection, SpeedComputation, ActuationCommandGeneration
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Enables operators to enable/disable ACC, set desired speed, and send emergency braking commands via UI, supporting Human-in-the-Loop operation"
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCEnableDisable, SetDesiredSpeed, EmergencyBrakingCommand
]

instance RealTimeVehicleStateVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of vehicle speed, position, and state parameters"
]

instance ObjectTracksVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visualization of detected and tracked objects from LiDAR data"
]

instance ProjectedPathVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Display of projected driving path for ACC system"
]

instance LeadVehicleDetection : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Detecting lead vehicle using sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance SpeedComputation : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Computing speed based on distance to lead vehicle"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ActuationCommandGeneration : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Generating actuation commands for ACC system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ACCEnableDisable : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Enabling or disabling ACC via operator UI"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SetDesiredSpeed : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Setting desired speed for ACC via operator UI"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakingCommand : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Sending emergency braking command via operator UI"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands (e.g., motor actuation, steering servo) are generated by the Controlling FE, translated via the Data Translation component, and transmitted over Wi-Fi UDP to the Actuation FE. ROS2 handles internal software component communication within the Digital Twin system."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The system requires 100 ms clock synchronization accuracy for computation offloading in safety-critical vehicular applications, as mandated by industry standards and constrained by hardware limitations, ensuring temporal consistency between physical and digital components."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Architected using ISO 23247 Reference Architecture (RA), software components are mapped to Functional Entities (FEs) implemented as ROS2 packages. Each FE is realized as ROS2 nodes organized into three entities: User Entity (with 3D Visualization and Control Panel), Digital Twin Entity (data management and control), and Physical Twin Entity (data pre-processing, actuation, and Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking), with the Physical Twin Entity representing a deviation from ISO 23247 by hosting general automotive functionality."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Internal communication between software components uses ROS2; inter-entity communication (e.g., between Physical Twin and Digital Twin entities) occurs over Wi-Fi using UDP transport layer. No details on bandwidth, latency, network topology, redundancy, or security protocols are specified."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Compliance with ISO 23247 standard, which includes four parts: Overview and general principles, Reference architecture, Digital representation of physical manufacturing elements, and Information exchange. Interoperability standards such as OPC Unified Architecture (OPC UA) are referenced for data collection and device control entity implementations."
]
